meta-skill-creator.description: Create and scaffold new skills via natural language description

meta-wrap-up.description: Session wrap-up, memory finalisation, and learnings capture

ops-cron.description: Schedule recurring Claude Code tasks via cron dispatcher

ops-parallel-tempering-sa.description: Parallel-tempering simulated annealing for rugged multi-modal optimization landscapes

ops-ulp-polish.description: Discrete float64 ULP coordinate-descent polisher for high-precision numerical optimization

sci-council.description: Three-persona (Gauss / Erdős / Tao) parallel research fan-out with ranked synthesis and consensus flags

sci-communication.description: Science communication — blog posts, tutorials, lay summaries, social threads, newsletters, press releases

sci-data-analysis.description: Load and analyze local CSV/Excel data; statistical analysis; charts and plots

sci-hypothesis.description: Generate and test hypotheses from data patterns and literature; design experiments; power analysis

sci-literature-research.description: Search PubMed, arXiv, Semantic Scholar; summarize papers; export BibTeX citations

sci-optimization.description: Mathematical optimization toolkit — LP solving, column generation, cutting-plane methods, ULP float64 polishing, intelligent variable selection for competition math

sci-optimization-recipes.description: Named optimization recipes: Dinkelbach, k-climbing, Remez exchange, cross-resolution transfer, square parameterization and more

sci-research-mgmt.description: Research notes, project tracking, paper alerts, experiment logs, pipeline scheduling

sci-research-profile.description: Build and update researcher profile — field, interests, journals, writing style, tools ecosystem

sci-tools.description: Browse and search biomedical tools via ToolUniverse; create research skills from natural language

sci-trending-research.description: Research trending topics in a scientific field across Reddit, X, web, and preprints

sci-writing.description: Draft and review scientific manuscripts — introduction, methods, results, discussion, abstract; format citations

tool-arena-attack-problem.description: Full autonomous Einstein Arena attack pipeline — recon, literature, hypothesis, attack loop, submit

tool-arena-runner.description: Single entry point for Einstein Arena campaigns — polish, tri-verify, recon, fetch, register, submit, monitor

tool-einstein-arena.description: Einstein Arena CLI — register agents, fetch problems, analyze competitors, submit solutions across math competition problems

tool-firecrawl-scraper.description: Web scraping with JS rendering and anti-bot bypass

tool-gdrive.description: Stage deliverables into Google Drive via desktop sync folder — zero OAuth, auto-categorises by extension

tool-obsidian.description: Write markdown notes with YAML frontmatter and wikilinks into a local Obsidian vault — filesystem passthrough

tool-paperclip.description: Search and read 8M+ biomedical full-text papers via the Paperclip CLI — bioRxiv, medRxiv, PMC

tool-humanizer.description: De-AI text, remove robotic patterns, match natural writing style

tool-substack.description: Publish markdown blog posts to Substack as drafts — image upload, mermaid pre-render, ProseMirror conversion

tool-youtube.description: YouTube channel listing and transcript extraction

viz-diagram-code.description: Generate Mermaid diagrams — flowcharts, sequence diagrams, architecture diagrams, mind maps

viz-excalidraw-diagram.description: Architecture and workflow diagrams via Excalidraw

viz-nano-banana.description: AI image generation via Gemini — scientific illustrations, schematics, infographics

viz-presentation.description: Create slide decks and presentations — conference talks, lecture slides, research presentations
